mapper.insert:
SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'PGM', 6)
INSERT INTO COM_PGM ( CO_ID, PGM_ID, PGM_CD, PGM_NM, PGM_TP_CD, PRNT_PGM_ID, DSP_ORDER, PGM_RMK, USE_FLG, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{pgmId}, #{pgmCd}, #{pgmNm}, #{pgmTpCd}, #{prntPgmId}, COALESCE(#{dspOrder}, 9999), #{pgmRmk}, COALESCE(#{useFlg}, 'Y'), #{creUsrId}, #{creUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_PGM SET PGM_CD = #{pgmCd}, PGM_NM = #{pgmNm}, PRNT_PGM_ID = #{prntPgmId}, DSP_ORDER = COALESCE(#{dspOrder}, 9999), PGM_RMK = #{pgmRmk}, USE_FLG = #{useFlg}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND PGM_ID = #{pgmId}
mapper.select:
SELECT PERM.CO_ID, PERM.PERM_ID, PERM.PERM_CD, PERM.PERM_NM, PERM.PGM_ID, PERM.CRE_DT, PERM.CRE_USR_ID, PERM.UPD_DT, PERM.UPD_USR_ID FROM COM_PERM PERM WHERE 1=1 AND PERM.CO_ID = #{coId}
AND PERM.PGM_ID = #{pgmId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'PERM', 6)
INSERT INTO COM_PERM ( CO_ID, PERM_ID, PERM_CD, PERM_NM, PGM_ID, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{permId}, #{permCd}, #{permNm}, #{pgmId}, #{creUsrId}, #{creUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_PERM SET PERM_CD = #{permCd}, PERM_NM = #{permNm}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND PERM_ID = #{permId}
